name: Chess
description: Full standard chess with local, solo, and share-code play.

name: Checkers
description: American checkers with forced captures and kings.

name: Blackjack
description: Take on the dealer with classic hit, stand, split, and double controls.

description: 4-player partnership Pitch. Bid, name trump, and chase High, Low, Jack, and Game.

name: Solitaire
description: Klondike draw-3 solitaire for solo practice or casual play.

name: Texas Hold'em
description: Cash-game style Hold'em with up to 6 seats, blinds, raises, all-ins, and side pots.
